name: Upcoming Departures
query:
SELECT
         d.name AS "Departure:Link/Tour Departure:200",
         d.tour_package AS "Package:Link/Tour Package:200",
         d.departure_date AS "Departs:Date:110",
         d.return_date AS "Returns:Date:110",
         d.total_seats AS "Seats:Int:80",
         d.available_seats AS "Available:Int:90",
         d.status AS "Status:Data:100"
       FROM `tabTour Departure` d
       WHERE d.departure_date >= CURDATE()
         AND d.status IN ('Scheduled', 'Confirmed', 'Full')
       ORDER BY d.departure_date ASC
